chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI CP D 1642 of 2019 ____________________________________________________________ DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE ____________________________________________________________ 1. For orders on Nazir report dated 26.03.2019 2. For orders on CMA No.9486/2019 3. For orders as to non-prosecution of CMA No.8060/2019 4. For orders as to non-prosecution of CMA No.7440/2019 5. For hearing of CMA No.8793/2019 6. For hearing of CMA No.8794/2019 7. For orders as to non-prosecution 03.03.2025 Mr. Abdul Razaq, advocate for the appellant Mr. Muhammad Kamran advocate holds brief for Mr. Muhammad Umer Lakhani, advocate for respondent Mr. Ghulam Akbar Lashari, advocate for respondent Learned counsel states that the respective show cause notices shall be contested before the issuing authority and in view hereof this petition may be disposed of. Order accordingly. Judge Judge Amjad
